plans.name: Free Plugins
plans.description: All PluggLAB plugins are completely free and community-ready.

projects.name: MemoryChain
projects.description: Shared plugin architecture and update foundation. The backbone of the PluggLAB ecosystem.

projects.name: PulseEvents
projects.description: Dynamic event system for Minecraft servers. Automate server-wide events with ease.

projects.name: Casino Core
projects.description: Modular casino engine with reward systems and slot mechanics.

projects.name: SafeTrade
projects.description: Protected player-to-player trading with confirmation flow, anti-scam checks, and clean inventory handoff.

projects.name: NovaPixel
projects.description: Competitive PvP texture pack with a modern style. Designed for performance and clarity.

projects.name: PvPFlow
projects.description: 1.8 PvP focused visual enhancement pack for classic competitive play.

posts.title: PluggLAB App is Live!
posts.summary: The official PluggLAB Android app is now available. Get all plugin info, updates, and events in one place.
posts.content: We're excited to launch the PluggLAB Android app. From now on, you can track plugin releases, read updates, and stay on top of events — all without opening a browser. The app fetches live data from our website so it's always up to date.

posts.title: PluggLAB Website Update
posts.summary: The PluggLAB website has received a fresh update with new improvements, better navigation, and updated content.
posts.content: We've released a new update for the PluggLAB website. This update introduces a refreshed layout, improved navigation, enhanced performance, and new sections to make exploring our projects easier. More features and content will continue to roll out in future updates, so stay tuned.

roadmap.title: Shared Infrastructure
roadmap.description: MemoryChain shapes a shared plugin architecture to support multiple PluggLAB releases and planned integrations.

roadmap.title: Economy Gameplay
roadmap.description: Casino Core expands into server gameplay with stronger reward and admin flows.

roadmap.title: Polished Ecosystem
roadmap.description: Visual packs, event utilities, and shared integrations settle into one consistent stack.

about.tagline: A focused Minecraft plugin lab delivering stable releases, free tools, and clear project progress.
about.description: PluggLAB is a polished Minecraft hub for stable plugins, free tools, and clear project updates. Everything here is designed to feel more professional, approachable, and ready for actual use.
about.creator_bio: Passionate Minecraft developer with years of experience in plugin development, server optimization, and community management. Specializing in scalable plugin architecture and modular systems design. Founded PluggLAB to create a focused hub for high-quality Minecraft projects.
